'''foshahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klutzish|klutzish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klutzish|klutzish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| foshahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshahithi|foshahithi]] || [[word:foshahiji|foshahiji]] || [[word:foshahishi|foshahishi]] || [[word:foshahiki|foshahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshahuthuthu|foshahuthuthu]] || [[word:foshahujuju|foshahujuju]] || [[word:foshahushushu|foshahushushu]] || [[word:foshahukuku|foshahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshahuthu|foshahuthu]] || [[word:foshahuju|foshahuju]] || [[word:foshahushu|foshahushu]] || [[word:foshahuku|foshahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshahufthuf|foshahufthuf]] || [[word:foshahufjuf|foshahufjuf]] || [[word:foshahufshuf|foshahufshuf]] || [[word:foshahufkuf|foshahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshahethe|foshahethe]] || [[word:foshaheje|foshaheje]] || [[word:foshaheshe|foshaheshe]] || [[word:foshaheke|foshaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshahothotho|foshahothotho]] || [[word:foshahojojo|foshahojojo]] || [[word:foshahoshosho|foshahoshosho]] || [[word:foshahokoko|foshahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshahotho|foshahotho]] || [[word:foshahojo|foshahojo]] || [[word:foshahosho|foshahosho]] || [[word:foshahoko|foshahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshahofthof|foshahofthof]] || [[word:foshahofjof|foshahofjof]] || [[word:foshahofshof|foshahofshof]] || [[word:foshahofkof|foshahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshahïfthïf|foshahïfthïf]] || [[word:foshahïfjïf|foshahïfjïf]] || [[word:foshahïfshïf|foshahïfshïf]] || [[word:foshahïfkïf|foshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshahïfthïfthïf|foshahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:foshahïfjïfjïf|foshahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:foshahïfshïfshïf|foshahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:foshahïfkïfkïf|foshahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshahïfthïf|foshahïfthïf]] || [[word:foshahïfjïf|foshahïfjïf]] || [[word:foshahïfshïf|foshahïfshïf]] || [[word:foshahïfkïf|foshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshahïfthïf|foshahïfthïf]] || [[word:foshahïfjïf|foshahïfjïf]] || [[word:foshahïfshïf|foshahïfshïf]] || [[word:foshahïfkïf|foshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshahæthæ|foshahæthæ]] || [[word:foshahæjæ|foshahæjæ]] || [[word:foshahæshæ|foshahæshæ]] || [[word:foshahækæ|foshahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshahathatha|foshahathatha]] || [[word:foshahajaja|foshahajaja]] || [[word:foshahashasha|foshahashasha]] || [[word:foshahakaka|foshahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshahatha|foshahatha]] || [[word:foshahaja|foshahaja]] || [[word:foshahasha|foshahasha]] || [[word:foshahaka|foshahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshahafthaf|foshahafthaf]] || [[word:foshahafjaf|foshahafjaf]] || [[word:foshahafshaf|foshahafshaf]] || [[word:foshahafkaf|foshahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:foshahasha|foshahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshahshësha|foshahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshahrosha|foshahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshahmusha|foshahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshahyasha|foshahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshahnkshësha|gofoshahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshahnkrosha|gofoshahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshahnkmusha|gofoshahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshahnkyasha|gofoshahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:foshashahasha|foshashahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshashahshësha|foshashahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshashahrosha|foshashahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshashahmusha|foshashahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshashahyasha|foshashahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshashahnkshësha|gofoshashahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshashahnkrosha|gofoshashahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshashahnkmusha|gofoshashahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshashahnkyasha|gofoshashahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:feshæhasha|feshæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:feshæhshësha|feshæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:feshæhrosha|feshæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:feshæhmusha|feshæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:feshæhyasha|feshæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofeshæhnkshësha|gofeshæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofeshæhnkrosha|gofeshæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofeshæhnkmusha|gofeshæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofeshæhnkyasha|gofeshæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:foshfahasha|foshfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshfahshësha|foshfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshfahrosha|foshfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshfahmusha|foshfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshfahyasha|foshfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshfahnkshësha|gofoshfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshfahnkrosha|gofoshfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshfahnkmusha|gofoshfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshfahnkyasha|gofoshfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
